channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Minnesota county charges an ICE officer in a nonfatal shooting during Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: A Minnesota county prosecutor has charged an Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer in the nonfatal shooting of a Venezuelan man during the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown in the state.

item.title: Redistricting debate shifts to South Carolina as Republicans seek clean sweep of US House seats
Riders navigate the first weekday of a strike that has shut down the largest US commuter rail system
